detaileddescription.para: How many points to use in the generated curve.

memberdef.name: heart4
memberdef.initializer: = { .command = "heart4", .lower = 0.0, .upper = 2.0, .num_points = 512, .min_points = 64, .max_points = 8192, .xscale = 0.04, .yscale = 0.04, .parameter = "t", .x = "/t exch def" "(*" "(cos t)" "((sin(t)*sqrt(abs(cos(t))))/(sin(t)+7/5) - 2*sin(t) + 2)" ")", .y = "/t exch def" "(*" "(sin t)" "((sin(t)*sqrt(abs(cos(t))))/(sin(t)+7/5) - 2*sin(t) + 2)" ")" }

detaileddescription.para: Parametric heart design based on postscript.

memberdef.name: heart5
memberdef.initializer: = { .command = "heart5", .lower = 0.0, .upper = 2.0, .num_points = 512, .min_points = 64, .max_points = 8192, .xscale = 0.04, .yscale = 0.04, .parameter = "t", .x = "16 t sin dup dup mul mul mul", .y = "13 t cos mul " "5 2 t mul cos mul sub " "2 3 t mul cos mul sub " "4 t mul cos sub" }

briefdescription.para: The sign of a real number.

detaileddescription.para: Basic mathematical function that goes by the same name in most texts. Often defined as x/|x| for x not equal to 0 and 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Indicator function that is 1 for all values greater than 0.

detaileddescription.para: Theta often occurs in parametric function descriptions of curves, similar to the general indicator function that takes a .

briefdescription.para: Parametric descriptions of common curves used in embroidery patterns.

detaileddescription.para: Copyright 2018-2025 The Embroidermodder Team libembroidery is Open Source Software, see LICENSE.md for licensing terms.
Read the reference manuals (https://www.libembroidery.org/documentation) for advice on altering this file.
